seoTitle: Gatum vs Gazette — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gatum and Gazette. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gatum and Gazette.
heading: Gatum vs Gazette — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gatum, Victoria and Gazette, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gazette has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Gatum (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gatum or Gazette safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gatum has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Gazette scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gatum scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Gazette scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gatum or Gazette?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gazette has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
